reviews.review_title: This is the worst VR game I ever played
reviews.review_description:
It’s so bad it made me want to cry. The graphics are really bad, and no one is even playing the game. When I got it and played it,  there was probably a total of 7 people playing the game,  including me and my friend. I don’t want this game anymore, so Adenny109 can talk to the customer service about getting his refund, since he gifted the game to me, and I want him to have his money back. 

Horrible game, and if the customer service doesn’t give his money back I’m suing
Sh

I’m pretty sure the developers played this for hours just to get a minutes worth of footage where the game was working to make a trailer.

This could honestly be such an addictive game. It’s just so janky. The lobbies glitch out, the game freezes and there’s no pause menu so you have to force quit, the hands don’t grip, items just float in your palm, you wait for what feels like forever as an intruder for the gate to open (honestly thought it had crashed again) and I don’t understand the blackout when you get hit.

However, the proximity chat is great, you can hear the team freaking out trying to work out where you are, and you can talk back putting them on edge. It feels like it the issues where sorted it would be well balanced and one of the funniest games to play!

Fingers crossed this gets the attention it deserves.

This game is hilarious. Me and my friend could not stop laughing. We would feel so dumb after seeing it in plain sight. Don’t pay attention to the other bad reviews on this game. I think they’re just mad they lost a round because dang I felt so stupid whenever I lost a round and the vault was obviously hidden.￼￼ this is a 9 out of 10. This is an awesome game if you just wanna have some goofy moments. Finally, I can play a game that all my friends enjoy, including me. There are a few glitches, but I bet the devs are working on that. This game is only in an early access and it is awesome and the glitches just make the game even funnier.

I have been expecting this game for a while now, and I fill like it’s really fun but then need to fix some things, first thing is that u can’t really control you hand and there are white lines coming out of it, secondly I think they should add a game mod where there are more ppl in the family but there are more robbers and that could be really cool. Over all I think the game is good and has a lot of potential
This game sucks I can’t even play for 5 seconds
I guess it's good ￼

reviews.review_title: It's a good game with potential
reviews.review_description: There are only two maps to choose from to play.🤔 there are no cops that come. You don't hear Sirens, police chatting, or anything like that.🙄like you see in the promo video.😒I love the graphics, though. It gets a little boring after a couple of times playing. In the promo video, the avatars have full bodies. NOPE, you only get half bodies! 🤨🫣Every time you start a new game, the board layout remains the same no matter how many times you play the game. it doesn't change... I have encountered a couple of glitches where I'll be standing by a window, and I'll fall right outside of the residents.😄 I love the fact that I can host a room and / or join other people's rooms. The play time is very short. After the game is over, you go straight back to the lobby. I was so hyped about this game because of the Promo video. The sounds on here are subparb. I bought a couple of copies of this game for a couple of my friends because I thought it was going to be like you see in the promo video. There are only minimum things you can interact with. Hopefully, they will add more items,levels, and places where you can hide the safe. Maybe if they can add a level editor. Wishful thinking . Keep up the good work, guys.

no RNG for items, no cop sirens or lights when arriving, no smooth turning option or an options setting for that matter. lobbies can be buggy when connections or joining into them. just the way the doors open, no crouch button. no option on who to preferably play. it’s just extremely bare bones with a good concept i just hope it’s not bonded like the original PC version. idk if i’ll be playing again or not until at least smooth turning is added only 2 maps and i was glitching through windows when turning as well.

This game make me laugh with my friends it is worth it if it is lagging turn your quality down 
￼
Kept falling out of the map, the guns barely register and it's a pretty repetitive game

reviews.review_title: Gets old but with time could be a 5 star
reviews.review_description: After playing 5-6 matches with my buddies it kinda got boring. Like there’s only 2 maps and only 1 of them is good the other is so easy for the robber. The planks that you use to block up doors shouldn’t all be breakable. Now I say this as in there should be certain planks that are in breakable but only for certain entrances to be blocked. Obviously you can’t just block off every entrance but it would make it easier for the people in the hosue to be able to know there are certain entrances blocked as it’s very easy to kill the prople in the hosue as the robber.. Bur anyways excited to see what the developers do with this game, and I think it has a very high roof for what it will be able to become.

I also feel like y’all should add like a ranked playlist with stats and every time the intruder gets the safe you should have like game money in there so they could buy like clothes for their aviator or like a weapon skin that would be really cool. this game has lots of potential if y’all work on it a bit!

developer_response.body:
Hey KNERZ, 

Appreciate you leaving a review! It's always a tough battle to figure out effective items for the family, since the family usually outweighs the robber in terms of player count. We are currently adding a lot more usable items for the family though, including a Scar-L styled BB gun and much more! Purchasable cosmetics are also on the way, but we're focusing on bugs and new maps for the next 1-2 months!
